title: [security] Duplicate build_* functions and inconsistent EDHOC helpers in edhoc.rs
description: Last 20 commits include e94753c30 which touched lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs (EDHOC key handling, MACs for auth, PRK derivation for OSCORE) but left duplicate definitions of build_context_2 (lines 444+ and 470+), build_context_3, build_signature_structure with different implementations (encode_bstr vs append_cbor_bstr, param differences). Causes compile errors, breaks MIC/signature paths in EDHOC->OSCORE. Also reviewed Schnorr48 in lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs (good: constant-time ct_eq, canonical checks, deterministic nonce, test vectors), keys.rs zeroization, link MIC verify, C link_ctx timing/slot hash. No other P0s but this blocks secure handshake. Matches focus: OSCORE/EDHOC/key handling.
